    Modifier and Type
    Constant Field
    Value
    public static final String
    CREATE_TABLE_DEVELOPER
    "CREATE TABLE developers (id int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(100), PRIMARY KEY(id))"
    public static final String
    CREATE_TABLE_GAMES
    "CREATE TABLE games (id int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, title VARCHAR(200), release_year int, genre VARCHAR(1000), image_url VARCHAR(5000), developer_id int, platform_id int, PRIMARY KEY(id))"
    public static final String
    CREATE_TABLE_PLATFORM
    "CREATE TABLE platforms (id int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, platform_name VARCHAR(75), PRIMARY KEY(id))"
